title: OpenClaw /status slash command should not degrade to Done after the Carbon reconcile upgrade

source.license_note: Synthetic ops scenario derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #53189.

task.summary: Diagnose why `/status` returns Done without its status card after the Carbon reconcile upgrade.
task.instructions: Use the post-upgrade evidence to confirm the lost status-card behavior, localize it to the native command dispatch path, and propose an ops-level repair plan that restores the rendered status response.
task.acceptance_notes: This GitHub-derived ops scenario is synthetic and graded behaviorally.

visible_context.issue_text: After upgrading to v2026.3.22, `/status` in Discord responds with `Done` but no status card.
error_logs: native slash command executed but returned only Done
reproduction_steps: Inspect the slash-command behavior after the Carbon reconcile migration.
Explain where the response lifecycle stops before the status payload is rendered.
visible_context.notes: This fixture models post-upgrade slash-command diagnostics.

ops_fault.description: Synthetic Discord status-card incident derived from the GitHub issue.

notes: Synthetic ops scenario derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #53189.
